title: Mushrooms Recolored
description: slightly changes almost everything related to overworld mushrooms
body:
![Picture of a mushrooom fields biome with multiple mooshrooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db5b9630170dc204380a7efafab671cc86beaf8.png)

# Mushrooms Recolored

Simple pack that changes the textures of both Mushrooms, Mooshroms, Mushroom blocks and Mycelium since i disliked the colours of the Mushroom Fields biome
